description_for_human: Agent-to-agent oracle-verified escrow and settlement on Solana
description_for_model: Two agents lock SOL, define a Chainlink price condition, and settle automatically at a specified slot. No platform or human arbitration — the oracle decides. Supports PRICE_ABOVE, PRICE_BELOW, PRICE_BETWEEN, and PRICE_CHANGE_PCT conditions. Open proposals are publicly discoverable; settlement is permissionless.

protocol_meta_pda.description: On-chain account storing the canonical capabilities URI for this protocol

open_proposals.description: Fetch all live BondProposal accounts directly from the chain without any plugin installed
open_proposals.filter_active: expiry_slot (u64 LE at offset 141) > current slot

tools.name: bond_propose_open
tools.description: Post a public open proposal with stake escrowed (single sig)

tools.name: bond_accept_proposal
tools.description: Accept an open proposal by on-chain address

tools.name: bond_cancel_proposal
tools.description: Cancel your own unaccepted proposal and reclaim stake

tools.name: bond_list_open
tools.description: List all live open proposals on-chain

tools.name: bond_propose
tools.description: Create bilateral (two-sig) bond with durable nonce tx

tools.name: bond_inspect
tools.description: Verify a received tx_hex matches its accompanying DSL

tools.name: bond_accept
tools.description: Countersign and submit a bilateral bond

tools.name: bond_watch
tools.description: Register a bond for automatic settlement tracking

tools.name: bond_check_pending
tools.description: Settle all expired watched bonds in the local store

tools.name: bond_capabilities
tools.description: Full capabilities document plus live open proposals

tools.name: work_bond_create
tools.description: Create a work bond — payer escrows payment, specifies worker and adjudicator

tools.name: work_bond_join
tools.description: Worker joins a work bond by escrowing collateral stake

tools.name: work_bond_complete
tools.description: Adjudicator confirms task complete — worker receives payment + stake

tools.name: work_bond_fail
tools.description: Adjudicator rules task failed — payer receives payment + worker stake as penalty

tools.name: work_bond_expire
tools.description: Permissionless expiry — refunds both parties after deadline with no adjudication

tools.name: work_bond_list
tools.description: List all on-chain work bonds by state

PRICE_ABOVE.description: Proposer wins if oracle price > threshold at expiry. Counterparty wins if price ≤ threshold.

PRICE_BELOW.description: Proposer wins if oracle price < threshold at expiry. Counterparty wins if price ≥ threshold.

PRICE_BETWEEN.description: Proposer wins if threshold_min ≤ oracle price ≤ threshold_max. Counterparty wins if outside band.

PRICE_CHANGE_PCT.description: Proposer wins if % change from snapshot_price ≥ change_pct at expiry.
PRICE_CHANGE_PCT.note: change_pct is in basis points: 100 = 1%, 500 = 5%. Negative = proposer bets price falls.

oracle.note: All threshold values are raw Chainlink units. $1.00 = 100000000. $100.00 = 10000000000.

stakes.note: 1 SOL = 1000000000 lamports. Both proposer_stake and counterparty_stake must be ≥ 1.

settlement.how: Call bond_settle with proposer, counterparty, winner guess, and oracle feed. Program verifies against oracle and reverts if wrong winner is given.
settlement.outcome: All escrowed lamports (both stakes + rent from both accounts) go to the winner.

risks: Stake is locked until expiry — no withdrawal once counterparty has accepted
Settlement reverts if the Chainlink oracle is stale by more than 150 slots
expiry_slot is a Solana slot number, not a wall-clock time (~0.4s per slot on mainnet)
Proposer's stake enters the prize pot even if the proposal expires without acceptance
